subcodes.first_line: O companion of the friends! For several years, clothed as a mendicant, thou didst wander the mountains and wilderness, lost in desert and plain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مونس یاران سالهای چند در لباس مستمند سرگشته کوه و صحراء و گمگشته دشت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @power of prayer
